reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for yoga / stretching due to the presence of a bed, rug, high ceiling, close wall, tv, and cabinet, which all obstruct clear floor space. The score of 4 reflects the significant obstacles present, despite the presence of large windows allowing natural light.
